product.name: mdpe 50mm tee compression connectors /fittings for mdpe water/irrigation pipe
product.description: MDPE (Medium Density Polyethylene) Tee water pipe fittings are commonly used in water supply systems to connect and branch off pipes in a three-way direction. These fittings are designed to withstand high pressure and are made from a durable material that is resistant to corrosion, chemicals, and UV radiation. They are commonly used in both domestic and industrial applications. The following are the sizes of MDPE Tee water pipe fittings and their uses: 20mm MDPE Tee: This size is commonly used for domestic water supply systems, irrigation systems, and sprinkler systems. 25mm MDPE Tee: This size is commonly used for water mains, agricultural irrigation systems, and sprinkler systems. 32mm MDPE Tee: This size is commonly used for water mains, agricultural irrigation systems, and sprinkler systems. 40mm MDPE Tee: This size is commonly used for water mains, industrial water supply systems, and agricultural irrigation systems. 50mm MDPE Tee: This size is commonly used for water mains, industrial water supply systems, and agricultural irrigation systems. In general, MDPE Tee water pipe fittings are used in situations where a pipe needs to be split off into two or more directions. They are easy to install and can be used with a variety of pipe materials, including MDPE, HDPE, and PVC pipes. They are also available in a range of other sizes to suit specific applications.

product.name: John Guest Speedfit Straight Coupler 28mm (Pack Of 2)
product.description:
JG Speedfit equal straight connector push-fit fitting for the connection of two equal pipe sizes. Simply push the push-fit fitting fully onto the pipe and twist the plastic nut clockwise to lock in place. To demount the connection, unlock the nut by hand and push the collet towards the body of the push-fit fitting and pull the pipe to release. 

The JG Speedfit equal straight connector push-fit fitting is up to 40% faster to install than traditional methods and is easier to use in confined spaces by removing the need for hot works and tools. Designed, manufactured and assembled in the UK.
Instant push-fit connection

This white D-shaped soft close toilet seat is designed for comfort, style, and easy maintenance. The soft close feature allows the seat and lid to close slowly and quietly, helping to prevent noise and wear.
The slimline UF design gives a modern, clean look that suits most contemporary bathrooms. With adjustable 360° hinges and a top-fix installation, it fits securely to most standard toilets and is easy to install.
Cleaning is simple thanks to the one-button quick release, allowing the seat to be removed quickly for better hygiene. Made from strong, durable materials, this toilet seat offers long-lasting performance and everyday comfort.
Size: 441 mm x 365 mm

product.name: Soft Close Toilet Seat with Quick Release D-Shape Toilet Lid Simple Top Fixing for Easy Clean with 360 Adjustable Hinges
product.description:
The seat features a non-irritant and comfortable design. The seat is well-contoured for universal bathroom square toilets. This stylish toilet seat blends beautifully into any modern bathroom. The simple design in white matches every bathroom interior. With an innovative fixing method our seat is a great investment to suit any type of bathroom decor.

Specifications:
Product Type:Soft Close Toilet Seat
Colour: White
Shape: D-Shape Toilet Seat
Size: 47 x 36.5cm
Inner ring : 29.8 x 22.2cm
Adjustable length: 46-48cm
Material: Urea-formaldehyde
Load: 150kg

D-Shape Toilet Seat Features:
1. Quiet-Close & Soft Closed feature helps prevents slamming.
2. Quick release, easy and proper cleaning.
3. Nonslip seat bumpers keep the seat from shifting.
4. Simple and time saving installation.
5. Top Quality Made, Ergonomic Design for Comfort Resistant to staining, fading, chipping and peeling.

Package Includes:
1 x D-Shape toilet seats (with fittings)
1 x Fitting instructions

Product Tags

Quick Release, Soft Close, Soft Close Toilet
